title: 24 Pcs Transparent Bubble Bobo Balloon, 18 Inch Bobo Balloons, Large Transparent Bubble Balloon, Crystal Clear Fillable Bobo Balloons for Christmas Wedding Birthday Party Decorations
features: PACKAGE INCLUDE- There are 24 pcs 18 inch / 46 cm wave balloons in this package. Amazing Decorations for Birthday, Wedding and other Events. Enough quantity can make your decoration more beautiful, and you can share it with your friends and family

DURABLE MATERIAL- These balloons are made of high quality transparent TPU. So it has stronger toughness and elasticity, which could be easily blown more round and big. The balloons are not easily broken, giving you a smooth using experience

DIY BOBO BALLOON- You can add any desired small accessories, such as feathers, decals, confetti, sequins, etc., to decorate the balloon. You can also add holiday tags and LED light strings to make the clear balloons more special

HOW TO USE- Pull the balloon a little before inflating so that it does not deform when inflated. Then you can put your favorite decorations in it. After it is filled, stretch the excess part and tie it directly. The circular design will meet your decoration needs for different occasions

GOOD FOR PARTY DECORATION- Bobo balloons can decorate backdrops, curtains, walls, furniture and many other places, can be used for carnival, birthday party, thanksgiving decoration, celebration, christmas, halloween, new year party, anniversary and more
description: Product description These Jumbo Transparent Bobo Balloons Balloons are perfect for parties, Photography, Wedding, Birthday party, Baby shower, Festivals Decorations, family gatherings, schools, shopping malls, offices, door decorations and bars Features: 1. STURDY AND DURABLE Firm and strong to use for a long time, the balloons are not easily broken, giving you a smooth using experience 2. DIY The transparent bobo balloon with large mouth design, no need to roll up the edges, you can put snacks, flowers 3. WIDE APPLICATIONS The circular design will meet your decoration needs for different occasions 4. EASY TO USE These bobo balloons can be filled with air and helium, will meet your decorative needs of different occasions Specification: Name: Transparent Bubble Bobo Balloon Size: 18 inch / 46 cm Color: Transparent Material: TPU Package Included: 24 x Transparent Bubble Bobo Balloon Warm tips: 1.Please stretch the bobo balloonsl vertically or horizontally before inflating, especially the edge of the balloon, so that the balloon can be blown into a good spherical shape 2.Do not inflate the balloon while avoiding sunlight, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction Safety Warning No
